verified: YES — py_compile zero errors on bot.py and server.py
style_notes: bot.py: async/await throughout, run_in_executor for all blocking I/O, locked_file for all file writes, STOP_EVENTS dict for per-user cancellation, ACTIVE_USERS set for concurrency guard, MINIAPP_QUEUE lazily initialized inside _combined_post_init. Android: uses target=='android' string comparison inside realtime_download/drain to skip Telegram upload and keep files on disk for /api/files.

key_fixes_summary.CRITICAL_1: asyncio.Queue module-level init → lazy init in post_init
key_fixes_summary.CRITICAL_3: android drain() called add_sent_files incorrectly → fixed
key_fixes_summary.CRITICAL_5: Mini App Stop button broken: stop_flag never read by bot → added to fallback poll
key_fixes_summary.MODERATE_1: wipe_downloads missing from _run_miniapp_download for telegram clients → added
key_fixes_summary.MODERATE_2: settings re-read per URL in inner loop → moved to once before loop
key_fixes_summary.MODERATE_3: Missing READ_MEDIA_IMAGES/VIDEO for Android 13+ → added to manifest
key_fixes_summary.MODERATE_5: isSyncing not reset on perm-denied + no per-file error feedback → fixed both
key_fixes_summary.MINOR_2: SCHEDULE_OPTIONS defined after handle_callback → moved above
